llm_keywords.evidence: |I| ranges from 8.90e-103 A at V=-0.1 V to 2.40e-05 A at V=-6 V, spanning about 97.43 decades.
The smallest listed |I| values occur near low |V|: 8.90e-103 A at -0.1 V and 6.90e-103 A at +0.1 V.

On the positive side, |I| rises from 7.83e-15 A at 1.0 V to 1.91e-09 A at 2.0 V and 2.25e-05 A at 6.0 V; on the negative side, |I| rises from 6.62e-15 A at -1.0 V to 1.78e-09 A at -2.0 V and 2.40e-05 A at -6.0 V.

Matched magnitudes are close on both sides: at |V|=1.0 V, |I| is 6.62e-15 A (-) versus 7.83e-15 A (+); at |V|=2.0 V, 1.78e-09 A (-) versus 1.91e-09 A (+); at |V|=6.0 V, 2.40e-05 A (-) versus 2.25e-05 A (+).
At higher positive bias, |I| is not strictly monotonic point-to-point, for example 1.86e-05 A at 5.45 V, 1.80e-05 A at 5.50 V, and 1.30e-05 A at 5.55 V.
ln(|I|/V^2) changes from about -14.22 at -6 V to -230.38 at -0.1 V, and from about -14.29 at +6 V to -230.63 at +0.1 V.
